title: The Impact of Digital Nomads
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: The rise of the digital nomad has (0) revolutionized the way we think about work. This new found (17) allows professionals to travel while maintaining their careers. For many, the (18) of a traditional office is a thing of the past. || However, this lifestyle is not without its (19). Loneliness and the (20) of a stable community can be challenging. To (21) these issues, many nomads join co-working spaces. The (22) of these hubs has led to a (23) of local economies in remote areas. (24), the long-term effects on local housing markets are still being debated.

questions.explanation: Noun indicating the ability to move freely.
Noun describing the state of being restricted to a space.
Plural noun meaning faults or failures.
Noun form of the adjective absent.
Verb meaning to succeed in dealing with a problem.
Noun indicating the state of being liked by many.
Noun with prefix re- and suffix -ization, meaning to imbue with new life.
Adverb used to introduce a concession.
